4. `action_items`: Task description in one sentence. Assignee: Full name. Due date: YYYY-MM-DD absolute date based on meeting date (2026-05-13). ID format: A1, A2...
5. `key_numbers`: Label describing the value, Value including unit. ID format: N1, N2...
